name: Critical Infrastructure Fix
scope: Fix reproducible Supabase schema and PWA service worker cache
changes: Added idempotent migration from old room_state to state_json
Fixed sw.js cache name and removed missing logo-cronogol.png
Changed SW install cache to Promise.allSettled and no silent failure
SW cache match uses ignoreSearch to handle cache-busting query strings
not_changed: RLS policies remain open prototype by design for this phase
manual_notes: Run SUPABASE_SCHEMA_v2_6_8.sql in Supabase if backend was created with older scripts
RLS hardening with room tokens remains a separate future phase
